description: Style NoteSummer glamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. Sweeten your warm-weather style with this kaftan which you can also wear over your swimsuit at the beach. If you're stuck in the city, accessorise it to add a urban spin with sky-high stiletto pumps.Product DetailsWhite round neck dress with flutter sleeves, has lace detail along the sleeves and along the front and has a fabric belt around the midriffMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDry away from direct sunlightWash with like coloursIron back to shapeSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
